prompt: Create a minimalist rainbow neon line-art illustration of a stylish female AI creator profile page on a social media app interface. Use clean continuous colorful sketch strokes on a pure white background, inspired by modern contour drawing art. The female character should stand outside the profile frame in a confident walking pose wearing a long coat, high-neck top, loose pants, and sneakers. Add elegant facial line details, curly short hair, and fashion-model vibes. The profile UI should include a circular profile picture, username ‘Noor’, verification badge, follower count, bio text, tabs, and a post preview. Add thin multicolor outlines only with no solid fill, maintaining a premium futuristic aesthetic. Ultra clean composition, minimal shadows, artistic neon pencil sketch style, modern social media poster design.
